text: Preamble

Aurelius Dynamics Employee Handbook
Version 3.2
January 2031

Welcome to Aurelius Dynamics
Welcome to Aurelius Dynamics, a technology and engineering company focused on
industrial automation, intelligent infrastructure, and large-scale sensor networks.
Founded in 2022 by Elena Voss, Marcus Hale, and Priya Nandakumar, Aurelius
Dynamics began as a small engineering consultancy operating from a single office in
Austin, Texas. The company was originally formed to help manufacturing firms
modernize outdated monitoring systems. Within three years, Aurelius Dynamics
expanded into predictive maintenance platforms, industrial AI systems, and
autonomous inspection technologies.
As of January 2031, Aurelius Dynamics employs 1,240 full-time employees across four
offices and serves more than 180 enterprise customers worldwide.
Our mission is simple:
"Transform industrial operations through intelligent systems that improve safety,
efficiency, and sustainability."

Company Locations
Aurelius Dynamics currently operates from four major offices.

Headquarters
Austin Innovation Center
Austin, Texas
Primary functions:
• Executive Leadership
• Product Strategy
• Finance
• Legal

East Coast Operations Center
Raleigh, North Carolina
Primary functions:
• Customer Success
• Technical Support
• Sales Operations

Research Campus
Boulder, Colorado
Primary functions:
• Artificial Intelligence Research
• Advanced Robotics
• Systems Engineering

European Operations Hub
Dublin, Ireland
Primary functions:
• International Sales
• Localization
• Compliance
Employees are officially assigned to one home office regardless of remote status.

Organizational Structure
The company is divided into six major divisions.

Division A: Platform Engineering
Responsible for:
• Backend Systems
• APIs
• Infrastructure
• Cloud Operations
Vice President:
Jordan Mercer

Division B: AI Systems
Responsible for:
• Machine Learning
• Predictive Analytics
• Data Science
Vice President:
Dr. Amelia Chen

Division C: Hardware Integration
Responsible for:
• Sensors
• Embedded Systems
• Device Certification
Vice President:
Samuel Ortega

Division D: Product Operations
Responsible for:
• Product Delivery
• Program Management
• Release Planning
Vice President:
Rachel Kim

Division E: Customer Solutions
Responsible for:
• Customer Deployment
• Consulting
• Training
Vice President:
Daniel Brooks

Division F: Corporate Services
Responsible for:
• HR
• Finance
• Legal
• Facilities
Vice President:
Olivia Hart

Internal Project Structure
The company organizes strategic initiatives into named programs.

Project Orion
Objective:
Develop next-generation predictive maintenance algorithms for industrial equipment.
Program Director:
Amelia Chen
Primary Location:
Boulder Research Campus

Project Atlas
Objective:
Create a unified infrastructure monitoring platform.
Program Director:
Jordan Mercer
Primary Location:
Austin Headquarters

Project Nova
Objective:
Develop autonomous inspection drones for energy facilities.
Program Director:
Samuel Ortega
Primary Location:
Boulder Research Campus

Project Horizon
Objective:
Expand European market presence by 40% before 2033.
Program Director:
Daniel Brooks
Primary Location:
Dublin Operations Hub

Remote Work Policy
Aurelius Dynamics supports hybrid work.
Full-time employees may work remotely up to three days per week.
Employees assigned to:
• Platform Engineering
• AI Systems
• Product Operations
may request fully remote status upon management approval.
Hardware Integration personnel must work on-site at least four days each week due
to laboratory requirements.
All employees must attend:
• Quarterly planning meetings
• Annual strategy summit
• Team-specific workshops
Remote work equipment allowance:
$1,800 annually per employee.
Approved purchases include:
• Monitors
• Ergonomic chairs
• Keyboards
• Microphones
• Webcams
Unused allowance does not carry forward.
Employee Benefits

Health Coverage
Employees receive:
• Medical Insurance
• Dental Insurance
• Vision Insurance
Coverage begins on the first day of employment.

Retirement Plan
The company provides:
5% salary matching on retirement contributions.

Learning Budget
Every employee receives:
$2,500 per year
for approved learning activities.
Eligible expenses include:
• Courses
• Certifications
• Conferences
• Technical Books

Wellness Benefit
Employees receive:
$600 annually
for wellness-related expenses.
Leave Policy

Vacation Leave
Employees receive:
20 vacation days per calendar year.
Unused vacation days may roll over up to:
10 days.

Sick Leave
Employees receive:
12 paid sick days annually.

Volunteer Leave
Employees receive:
3 paid volunteer days annually.

Parental Leave
Primary caregivers:
18 weeks paid leave.
Secondary caregivers:
8 weeks paid leave.

Security and Compliance
All employees must complete annual security training.
Mandatory completion deadline:
February 15 each year.
Employees are required to use:
• Multi-factor authentication
• Company-managed password vault
• Encrypted devices
Sensitive customer data must never be stored on personal devices.
Any suspected security incident must be reported within:
2 hours of discovery.
Security incidents are managed by the Cyber Defense Office located in Austin.
Annual Company Events

Engineering Summit
Held every April.
Location rotates annually.

Innovation Week
Held every July.
Employees may dedicate 100% of their work time to experimental projects.

Leadership Forum
Held every September.
Attendance is invitation only.

Company Assembly
Held every December.
All employees are expected to attend virtually or in person.

2031 Strategic Objectives
Objective 1:
Increase annual recurring revenue to $420 million.
Objective 2:
Reduce platform downtime by 35%.
Objective 3:
Launch Project Nova pilot deployments in three countries.
Objective 4:
Expand workforce to 1,500 employees.
Objective 5:
Achieve customer satisfaction score of 92%.

Message from the CEO
Aurelius Dynamics was built on the belief that engineering can solve meaningful
problems when talented people work together with clarity and purpose.
As we enter 2031, our focus remains on creating systems that improve industrial
safety, reduce operational waste, and empower our customers to make smarter
decisions.
Every employee contributes directly to that mission.
Thank you for helping build the future.
— Elena Voss
Chief Executive Officer
Aurelius Dynamics
